DTC Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC).rationale: Blended paid channel CAC for AU/UK markets

Monthly Subscription Churn Rate.rationale: Performance supplements with tangible results tracking

One-off Repeat Purchase Rate (monthly).rationale: 5% of one-off pool repurchases each month

DTC COGS % (product cost).rationale: 70% gross margin on product cost; Pine Bark extract

Wholesale Price per 14-pack.rationale: ~48% discount off DTC list for distributors

Wholesale COGS % (product cost).rationale: Same manufacturing cost base as DTC

Wholesale Fulfillment per Case.rationale: Bulk palletised shipping — lower per unit

Wholesale Transaction Fee %.rationale: Bank transfer / invoice — no gateway fee

Avg Cases per Order (new country, Year 1.rationale: Initial trial orders — small case quantities

Avg Cases per Order Growth (annual).rationale: 25% annual increase in avg order size

Retail Launch Month (month # from Jul-25.rationale: Month 37 = Jul-28. Change to move launch date.

Retail Price per 14-pack.rationale: ~13% discount off DTC list for retail margin sharing

Units per Door Annual Growth.rationale: 10% annual increase as brand gains traction

Tax Rate.rationale: Australian corporate tax rate (base rate entity)
